title: Coral: a dual context-aware basecaller for nanopore direct RNA sequencing - DRS test dataset
author: Xie, Shaohui
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Raw RNA sequencing data from Oxford Nanopore.  The dataset is comprised of 100k randomly selected reads. 
 Zebrafish's original data is from ENA accession ERX9536682.
